scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full ReferralHero surface (campaigns management, webhooks, custom fields, exports) is out of scope until Pass B. ReferralHero is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; ReferralHero connector is read-only
